description: These lightweight training shoes from puma add superior value to the classic design. The shoes come with great midsole support coupled with shock absorber function making them perfect for both Sports and lifestyle.Upper Mesh upper for maximum breathability Reflectives for greater safety dawn to dusk Padded collar and tongue for snug Fit and shock absorption Lace-up system for snug fit Midsole IdCELL midsole with ArchTec component for greater support OrthoLite insole for superior breathability, moisture control, anti-microbial properties Cushioned footbed made from an environmentally friendly, sustainable material instead of traditional fossil fuel-based material Outsole EverTrack outsole for abrasion resistance with EverRide component for lightweight cushioning Multi-directional potsole in carbon rubber for strong grip on uneven terrain Scoop below the heel area for ultimate air traction while running or walking
